content.full_text:
June 17, 2008

Dan Paranick
Executive Director
California State Sheriffs’ Association
1231 I Street, Suite 200
Sacramento, CA 95812

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-068

Dear Mr. Paranick:

In a letter to you dated April 23, 2008, we advised that unless we received additional information regarding your request for advice we may withdraw your request. The purpose of this correspondence is to confirm that since we have not received the requested information, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

However, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may simply request it anew at that time and provide the requested information.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division
